🤖AI-GENERATED CONTENT: All suggestions, diagnoses, drug recommendations, interaction warnings, risk scores, and report interpretations are AI-generated using the K Spider AI system. These are for clinical reference only and must be independently verified by the prescribing doctor before any clinical decision or action.
💊FOR PHARMACISTS: Do NOT dispense any medicine based solely on this AI-generated document. Medicines must only be dispensed upon receipt of a valid, signed prescription from a registered medical practitioner as per Drugs & Cosmetics Act, 1940.
🔬FOR DIAGNOSTIC LABS / INVESTIGATIONS: No investigation or test should be conducted solely on the basis of this AI output. All investigation orders must be confirmed and signed by the prescribing doctor before execution.
👨‍⚕️DOCTOR'S RESPONSIBILITY: The prescribing doctor bears full clinical and legal responsibility for all prescriptions issued. K Spider AI and K Spider for Kreation are not liable for any clinical decisions made on the basis of AI-generated content.
🔒DATA PRIVACY: All patient data is stored locally on your device only. No patient data is transmitted to any external server. By using this tool, you confirm you are a registered medical practitioner and accept full clinical responsibility.

⚖️ CLINICAL RESPONSIBILITY DISCLAIMER — K Spider AI Phase 3

"This tool is a clinical assistance system. Final responsibility lies with the prescribing doctor. K Spider AI is not responsible for misuse."

This AI tool is designed to ASSIST registered medical practitioners ONLY. All AI-generated suggestions — diagnoses, drug recommendations, interaction warnings, risk scores, and report interpretations — must be independently verified by the prescribing doctor before clinical use. This is NOT a substitute for professional medical evaluation, examination, or judgment. Patient data is stored locally only — never transmitted. By using this tool, you confirm you are a registered medical practitioner and accept full clinical responsibility for all prescriptions issued. Emergency alerts are AI-generated and require immediate clinical reassessment — they are not a replacement for clinical triage protocols.

🚀 Phase 3 Activated: PHASE 4 Disease DB 430+ conditions (10 specialties) · Emergency Alert Engine · Drug Interaction Warning System · Pregnancy/Elderly Safety Flags · Pediatric Growth Chart Calculator · Enhanced BMI/BP · Auto Risk Scoring · Multi-language Output (EN/HI/GU/MR/TA/TE/BN) · AdSense + Affiliate Earning Spaces

🔬AI LAB INTERPRETATION: All lab report interpretations provided by this tool are AI-generated for reference purposes only. Normal ranges may vary by laboratory, methodology, age, gender, and clinical context.
👨‍⚕️DOCTOR MUST CONFIRM: All interpretations must be reviewed and confirmed by the prescribing/treating doctor before any clinical decision. AI output does not replace clinical judgment.
🧪LAB/DIAGNOSTIC NOTICE: No further investigation or repeat test should be ordered solely based on this AI interpretation. Doctor's written order is mandatory for all diagnostic procedures.
⚠️ AI REPORT INTERPRETATION — SAFETY NOTICE This tool provides reference-based interpretation only. Normal ranges may vary by laboratory, methodology, and patient demographics. Always correlate with clinical findings. This does NOT replace a pathologist's report or clinical judgment.

🌿 Allergy & IgE Panel
Total IgE is a general screening marker. Specific IgE (sIgE) tests indicate sensitization to individual allergens. Values in kUA/L: <0.35=Class 0 (none); 0.35–0.7=Class I; 0.7–3.5=Class II; 3.5–17.5=Class III; 17.5–50=Class IV; >50=Class V+
Allergen / ParameterYour ValueUnitNormal / ClassResult
Total IgEIU/mL<100 (adult normal); <150 (atopic tendency)
Specific IgE: Dust Mite (D.pteronyssinus)kUA/L<0.35 (Class 0 = No allergy)
Specific IgE: House DustkUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: Cat DanderkUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: Dog DanderkUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: CockroachkUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: Pollen Mix (Grass)kUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: Mould (Alternaria)kUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: Cow's MilkkUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: Egg WhitekUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: WheatkUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: PeanutkUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: SoybeankUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: Shrimp/ShellfishkUA/L<0.35
Specific IgE: LatexkUA/L<0.35
Eosinophil Count (Absolute)cells/μL<500 (mild if 500–1500; severe >1500)

K Spider Doctor AI — Free Medical AI Tool for Indian Doctors

A comprehensive, AI-powered clinical decision support system featuring a 1,244-drug database, prescription builder, lab report interpretation, drug interaction checker, and multi-language output — completely free for registered medical practitioners in India.

🚀 Key Features of K Spider Doctor AI

💊
Drug Database
1,244+ drugs across all specialties with dosage, contraindications & interactions
📋
Prescription Builder
Build, preview and share professional prescriptions with WhatsApp sharing
🔬
Lab Interpretation
Interpret CBC, LFT, KFT, TFT, lipids, ABG and 28+ lab panels automatically
⚠️
Interaction Checker
Real-time drug-drug interaction alerts with severity grading
🌐
Multi-Language Output
EN, हिंदी, ગુજ, मराठी, தமிழ், తెలుగు, বাংলা, ಕನ್ನಡ, മലയ, ਪੰਜਾਬੀ
🧠
AI Suggestions
Symptom-based AI clinical suggestions across 430+ disease conditions

📖 How to Use K Spider Doctor AI

1
Enter Doctor Profile
Fill your clinic details once — auto-fills all prescriptions
2
Select Symptoms
Pick symptoms from the AI checklist by specialty
3
Get AI Suggestions
Receive diagnosis, investigation & drug suggestions instantly
4
Build Prescription
Add medicines, verify interactions, then print or share

✅ Benefits for Indian Doctors

✔ 100% Free — No subscription, no registration required  |  ✔ Works Offline — Full functionality without internet (PWA)  |  ✔ Legally Compliant — Follows Drugs & Cosmetics Act guidelines  |  ✔ Privacy First — All patient data stored only on your device  |  ✔ 430+ Diseases — Covering 10 major medical specialties  |  ✔ WhatsApp Sharing — Send prescriptions directly to patients

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

🩺 Is K Spider Doctor AI free to use?
Yes! K Spider Doctor AI is 100% free for Indian doctors. No subscription, no hidden charges. Access all features including the drug database, prescription builder, lab interpretation and AI suggestions at no cost.
💊 How many drugs are in the database?
The K Spider Doctor AI drug database contains 1,244+ drugs covering antibiotics, cardiovascular, respiratory, endocrinology, neurology, oncology, emergency medicines and more. New drugs are added regularly.
🔒 Is patient data safe and private?
Yes. All patient data is stored locally on your device only. No patient information is transmitted to any external server or third party. Your data stays with you — completely private and secure.
🌐 Can I use it in regional languages?
Yes! K Spider Doctor AI supports multi-language output in English, Hindi, Gujarati, Marathi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Kannada, Malayalam and Punjabi. Share prescriptions and medical advice in your patient's language.
📱 Does it work on mobile devices?
Yes. K Spider Doctor AI is fully mobile-responsive and works on all devices. You can also install it as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on your phone for offline access directly from your home screen.

⚖️ Legal & Policy

🔒 Privacy Policy
All patient data is stored locally on your device. We do not collect, transmit, or sell any personal information. No patient data leaves your device. Analytics data (non-personal) may be collected via Google Analytics.
📜 Terms & Conditions
This tool is for use by registered medical practitioners only. By using K Spider Doctor AI, you agree that clinical decisions remain the sole responsibility of the prescribing doctor. The tool is provided as-is for reference only.
⚠️ Disclaimer
K Spider Doctor AI provides informational and clinical decision support tools only. AI-generated suggestions may vary. Users must independently verify all clinical information. This tool is not a substitute for professional medical judgment.
🧑‍💼 About Us
K Spider Doctor AI is developed by Gaurang Raval & Khush Raval (K Spider for Kreation), Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Our mission is to provide free, powerful AI tools for Indian doctors and content creators.

⚠️ K Spider AI — Doctor Elite Pro Max | Official Medical & Legal Disclaimer
🤖 AI Tool Notice: K Spider AI – Doctor Elite Pro Max is an AI-assisted clinical support tool. All AI-generated suggestions, diagnoses, drug recommendations, interaction warnings, risk scores, lab interpretations, and prescription content are for reference only and do not constitute medical advice.
💊 Pharmacist / Medical Store: Do NOT dispense any scheduled or prescription medicine based solely on AI-generated content from this tool. A valid, signed prescription from a registered medical practitioner is mandatory as per the Drugs & Cosmetics Act, 1940 and Pharmacy Practice Regulations 2015 (India).
🔬 Diagnostic Labs / Investigations: Do NOT conduct any medical investigation, imaging, or pathology test solely based on AI-generated output. All test orders must be confirmed in writing by the prescribing doctor before execution.
👨‍⚕️ Doctor's Responsibility: The prescribing doctor bears full clinical, ethical, and legal responsibility for all prescriptions issued using this tool. K Spider AI, K Spider for Kreation, Gaurang Raval, and Khush Raval are not liable for any clinical decisions made on the basis of AI-generated content.
🔒 Data Privacy: All patient data is stored locally on your device only. No patient information is transmitted to any external server or third party.

Open in browser and press Ctrl+P to print.'); } } // ── Download Functions ────────────────────────────────────── // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ████ MOBILE-SAFE TOAST NOTIFICATION ████████████████████████ // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function _showToast(msg, type, duration) { type = type || 'success'; duration = duration || 2500; const colors = { success:'#059669', error:'#dc2626', info:'#1e3a8a', warning:'#f59e0b' }; const t = document.createElement('div'); t.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:'+colors[type]+';color:white;padding:12px 22px;border-radius:30px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;z-index:99999;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);max-width:90vw;text-align:center;word-break:break-word;pointer-events:none;animation:fadeInUp 0.3s ease;'; t.textContent = msg; document.body.appendChild(t); setTimeout(()=>{ t.style.opacity='0'; t.style.transition='opacity 0.4s'; setTimeout(()=>{ if(t.parentNode) t.parentNode.removeChild(t); }, 500); }, duration); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ████ UNIVERSAL CLIPBOARD COPY (mobile-safe) ████████████████ // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function _safeCopy(text, successMsg) { successMsg = successMsg || '✅ Copied to clipboard!'; function fallback() { // Create textarea, select, copy const ta = document.createElement('textarea'); ta.value = text; ta.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;opacity:0;width:1px;height:1px;'; document.body.appendChild(ta); ta.focus(); ta.select(); try { document.execCommand('copy'); _showToast(successMsg, 'success'); } catch(e) { // Last resort: show in prompt prompt('Copy this text (Ctrl+A, Ctrl+C):', text); } document.body.removeChild(ta); } if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) { navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(()=>{ _showToast(successMsg, 'success'); }).catch(()=>{ fallback(); }); } else { fallback(); } } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // ████ MOBILE-SAFE WHATSAPP OPEN █████████████████████████████ // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function _openWhatsApp(number, message) { const encoded = encodeURIComponent(message); let url; if (number && number.replace(/\D/g,'').length >= 10) { const n = number.replace(/\D/g,''); const fullN = n.length === 10 ? '91' + n : n; url = 'https://wa.me/' + fullN + '?text=' + encoded; } else { url = 'https://wa.me/?text=' + encoded; } // Mobile: use location, Desktop: open new tab if (/Mobi|Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent)) { window.location.href = url; } else { const w = window.open(url, '_blank'); if (!w) { window.location.href = url; } } } function downloadRxPDF() { const printEl = document.getElementById('rx-printable') || document.getElementById('prescription-content'); if (!printEl || !printEl.innerHTML.trim()) { buildPreview(); setTimeout(downloadRxPDF, 900); return; } const doctor = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('doctor_profile') || '{}'); if (!doctor.name) doctor.name = 'Doctor'; const patName = (document.getElementById('patient_name') ? document.getElementById('patient_name').value : '') || 'Patient'; const dateStr = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN').replace(/\//g,'-'); const fileName = 'Rx_' + patName.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g,'_') + '_' + dateStr + '.html'; const style = `*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;} body{font-family:'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;color:#111;padding:10mm;} .prescription-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a8a,#0891b2);color:white;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:8px 8px 0 0;print-color-adjust:exact;-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;} .prescription-box{border:2px solid #1e3a8a;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:0 0 8px 8px;} .rx-section{margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px dashed #c7d2fe;} .rx-section:last-child{border-bottom:none;} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;} th{background:#1e3a8a;color:white;padding:5px 8px;font-size:11px;text-align:left;print-color-adjust:exact;-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;} td{padding:5px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:11px;} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:#f8fafc;} .rx-footer{margin-top:16px;padding:10px 14px;background:#f0f9ff;border:1px solid #bae6fd;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;text-align:center;color:#0c4a6e;} .disclaimer{margin-top:10px;padding:8px 12px;background:#fff8e1;border-left:4px solid #f59e0b;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;color:#7c4a00;} .no-print{display:none!important;} @media print{@page{size:A4;margin:10mm;} body{padding:0;} .no-print{display:none!important;}}`; const discText = '✅ ISSUED BY DOCTOR: This document is prepared and issued by the prescribing doctor using K Spider AI as a clinical support tool. Doctor bears full clinical responsibility. Do NOT self-medicate — consult your doctor if any concern arises.'; const footText = 'K Spider AI | www.kspiderai.in' + (doctor.clinic ? ' | ' + doctor.clinic : '') + (doctor.phone ? ' | ' + doctor.phone : ''); // Mobile-safe print button inside the PDF const printBtn = `

🔒 DPDP Act 2023 — Data Privacy Compliance
📋 Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (India)
This tool complies with DPDP Act 2023 principles. All patient data is stored locally on your device. No data is transmitted to external servers without explicit consent.
✅ Compliance Checklist
🔐 Data Storage Policy
✅ All patient data stored in browser localStorage only
✅ No cloud sync — fully offline operation
✅ No third-party data sharing
✅ Patient data can be deleted anytime
✅ No cookies used for patient data
✅ Prescription PDFs generated locally
⚙️ Data Management
📝 Patient Consent Record
🏥 ABDM — Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission
🔶 Integration Status: Pending Setup
ABDM Health ID (ABHA) integration requires API credentials from NHA. This section provides the UI structure for future integration.
🔍 ABHA Health ID Lookup
➕ Create ABHA for Patient
⚠️ Requires live NHA API credentials. Mock mode active.
🗄️ Health Locker — PHR Records
Patient's health records stored securely under their ABHA ID in the national Health Locker ecosystem.
🚨 Emergency Treatment — Cashless Note Generator
Generate an official emergency treatment note for cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals under PMJAY (Ayushman Bharat), ESI, CGHS, or private insurance schemes.

Fill form and click Generate to create emergency note.
